title: mobile app is missing the views button

posts.author: Jean187 (Michael)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it normal that in the ios app the views button is not showing for me like in that guide?

I see the magnifying class on top but to the left of it not views button (filter and main table)

https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360015740220-Mobile-app-board-views

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Jean187:

Is it normal that in the ios app the views button is not showing for me like in that guide?

I see the magnifying class on top but to the left of it not views button (filter and main table)

On iOS the interface is a bit different from the web/desktop guides, so what you’re seeing is likely normal and just a UI/layout difference, not a bug.

Are you missing something that’s shown in the guide and not on mobile?

A few points to check:

  1. Different layout than the guide

    • Many monday.com guides use web or desktop screenshots, where you see a clear “Views” button (or dropdown) near the top (e.g., “Main Table”, “Filter”, etc.).

    • On mobile (iOS), that same functionality is usually tucked into icons or menus rather than a labeled “Views” button.

  2. Where views usually are on iOS
    Depending on your app version and board type, you’ll typically find views in one of these places:

    • A tab bar at the top of the board (e.g., “Main Table”, “Kanban”, “Gantt”) that you can swipe/horizontally scroll.

    • A menu icon (three dots ••• or similar) near the top-right of the board, where you might see “Views” or view options.

    • Some filters are under a funnel/filter icon rather than under “Views”.

  3. Why the guide doesn’t match

    • If the guide explicitly shows a “Views” text button near the search icon, it’s likely a web or older mobile UI screenshot.

    • The iOS app gets UI updates on its own schedule, so layout and icon placement can differ from the docs for a while.

  4. Things to try

    • Make sure you’re on the latest version of the monday.com iOS app (App Store → Updates).

    • Open a board and look for:

      • A horizontal strip of view names under the board title, or

      • A three‑dot menu or other icon near the search (magnifying glass).

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: To confirm, are you meaning the board views or the item views (ie ‘inside’ items)?
